name: Daily Digest
description: Daily morning email summary of yesterday's workspace activity, sent to the owner at a scheduled time.

args.subject: Your morning update from {{orgName}}
args.body:
Good morning {{firstName}},

Here's a gentle look at how yesterday went at the clinic. A few new patients reached out, some appointments moved through the books, and the day wrapped up without anything urgent waiting on you.

Nothing here needs a response — just wanted you to have the picture before chairs start filling up. We'll keep things running smoothly on our end.

Warmly,
Bright Smile Dental
